name: deploy-prototype
description: Publish a UX prototype build (static HTML or SPA dist) to a chosen hosting target. Supports Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare Pages, GitHub Pages, and Surge via the target CLI -- the plugin never embeds credentials.
author: AgentX

args.name: Target
args.description: Hosting target: vercel | netlify | cloudflare | github-pages | surge

args.name: BuildDir
args.description: Path to the built prototype directory (default: dist)

args.name: ProjectName
args.description: Project / site name for targets that require one (Netlify site, Surge subdomain, Cloudflare project)

args.name: Branch
args.description: Branch to publish for github-pages (default: gh-pages)

args.name: Prod
args.description: Switch: deploy as production rather than preview (where supported)
